segments.text: KO! Two forward smashes takes out Chico!
segments.original_text: チコを倒す2回横スマッシュ

segments.text: He's definitely going for the kill
'I'm absolutely beating you!' - that's the mindset!
segments.original_text: 絶対お前倒してやるからなっていう

segments.text: That's exactly what he was waiting for!

full_text: KO! Two forward smashes takes out Chico! There's some serious animosity here! Yeah, for sure He's definitely going for the kill 'I'm absolutely beating you!' - that's the mindset! Up smash! That's exactly what he was waiting for!
